video_prompt: A continuous AAA anime game skill CG showing one straw hat pirate preparing, charging, releasing, striking, and recovering from a close-range fire-and-lightning punch. Keep one continuous action arc with readable timing and no on-screen text.
character_prompt: The same young straw hat pirate in every keyframe: tan skin, black messy hair, round eyes, straw hat with red band, open red vest, blue shorts, sandals, lean athletic body, determined expression.
style_prompt: High-detail Unreal Engine 5 style anime game cinematic, dramatic rim light, wet stone arena at night, storm clouds, orange fire mixed with blue-white lightning, sharp clean image, no watermark, no subtitles.

shots.camera: Low medium shot, camera slightly below waist height, slow push in from front-left.
shots.subject: The pirate plants his feet wide on wet stone, one hand touching the straw hat brim, shoulders squared before the attack.
shots.vfx: Only faint sparks around the clenched right fist and rain mist around the feet.

shots.camera: Tighter three-quarter close-up from the right side, slight handheld tension.
shots.subject: The pirate lowers his center of gravity and pulls the right fist far behind his body, jaw clenched, eyes locked forward.
shots.vfx: Red-orange heat haze begins wrapping the forearm while small blue lightning filaments snap around the knuckles.

shots.camera: Dynamic close-up of the charged fist in foreground with the face behind it, shallow depth of field.
shots.subject: The fist swells visually with power as the pirate twists the torso, hat shadow over intense eyes, muscles tensed before launch.
shots.vfx: Dense spiral of fire, red steam, and blue-white lightning coils around the arm, bright core glow on the fist.

shots.camera: Fast tracking side shot, camera whipping with the punch direction, strong diagonal composition.
shots.subject: The pirate lunges forward from the back foot and drives the charged fist across frame, body stretched into a powerful straight punch.
shots.vfx: A long comet-like trail of orange fire and branching blue lightning follows the fist, rain vaporized into white streaks.

shots.camera: Extreme close impact frame from a low front angle, slight lens shake, fist centered.
shots.subject: The charged fist connects with an unseen armored target just off frame, the pirate's face visible behind the blast with fierce focus.
shots.vfx: Explosive circular shockwave, cracked wet stone, fire burst, blue lightning forks radiating from the impact point.

shots.camera: Medium hero shot, camera settles in front of the pirate with smoke drifting past the lens.
shots.subject: The pirate holds the finishing stance with the arm extended, then begins to relax while the straw hat tilts back into view.
shots.vfx: Fading embers, residual blue lightning crawling over the fist, smoke and rain mist clearing to reveal cracked ground.
